docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEUNG, VIVIAN AS TO DEFENDANT DALY CITY SUSHI & SEAFOOD BUFFET, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA MC SKEWER JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
